Description: Primary key — unique identifier for the police unit. Referenced by CaseMaster.PoliceStationID, Employee.UnitID, ArrestSurrender.PoliceStationID
Name of the unit or police station
FK → UnitType.UnitTypeID — type/category of the unit
Parent unit ID for hierarchy (self-reference to UnitID)
FK → State.StateID — state the unit belongs to
FK → District.DistrictID — district the unit belongs to
